records.pageMarkerPattern: PyMuPDF page index + 1; no source-authored page marker is trusted without review
records.headwordPattern: uppercase or title-case line start ending with punctuation or strong whitespace boundary
records.lineStructure: direct PDF text lines, trimmed; entry segmentation remains candidate-level
knownRisks: direct text extraction did not produce usable headword candidates
